title: Graph JS Library Comparison
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Educational Technology
description: Interactive comparison table comparing popular JavaScript graph visualization libraries.

learningObjectives: Analyze the tradeoffs between SVG, Canvas, WebGL, and DOM-based graph drawing libraries.
Select the appropriate library based on performance, licensing, and framework needs.

keyQuestions: What rendering technology scales past 5,000 nodes?
How does React native integration affect layout styling?
commonMisconceptions: A larger bundle size always means faster execution.
SVG is more performant than WebGL for massive datasets.
assessmentOpportunities: Formulate a recommendation write-up choosing a library for a 10,000-node concept database.
